claims.summary: Regulatory evidence should distinguish suppression, crowding, porosity loss, viscosity, and contact quality instead of treating all distance as error.
claims.disposition: verify current typed pressure, porosity, viscosity, mobility, and correspondence evidence

claims.summary: Boundary cartography can identify rigid contraction, diffuse uninhabited regions, returnable turbulence, and pressure plateaus without tuning them.
claims.disposition: record the read-only grid, counterfactual, and live-database replay artifacts

claims.summary: Changing receptivity, porosity floors, participation, pressure response, fill targets, or regulator flow would alter live behavior.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No receptivity, porosity, participation, pressure, fill, or regulator-flow change is authorized.
